MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Vacating and Setting Aside Order Dismissing Case is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Order Dismissing case issued on 11/13/2007 is set aside. Order signed.
